notes:
First official release of Watermark Lab.

- Watermark PowerPoint (.pptx/.ppt) and video files (.mp4 .mov .mkv .avi .webm)
- Custom text, color picker, transparency slider
- PDF export option (PowerPoint only)
- Open file after watermarking checkbox (on by default)
- Folder icon in status bar - click to open output folder
- Splash screen on launch
- ffmpeg downloaded automatically on first video use
- In-app auto-updater via GitHub Releases
- Full dark theme throughout
